cards.name: THE COMEBACK KID
cards.note: Every setback was just a wind-up for the swing that's coming.

cards.name: THE BIG HEART
cards.note: The people you carried will carry you back. That's how it works.

cards.name: THE GRINDER
cards.note: Talent is loud; consistency wins the season. You've got the rarer one.

cards.name: THE DREAMER
cards.tagline: Sees the version nobody else can.
cards.note: The wild idea you can't shake? That's the one. Build it.

cards.name: THE STEADY HAND
cards.note: When it all shakes, you're the one people stand next to. Don't forget that.

cards.name: THE SPARK
cards.tagline: Lights up the room on entry.
cards.note: Your energy is contagious — use it on purpose and watch it spread.

cards.name: THE BUILDER
cards.tagline: Makes things that outlast the day.
cards.note: What you make compounds. The attic you fill becomes the house you live in.

cards.name: THE SURVIVOR
cards.note: You already did the hard part — you didn't quit. The rest is downhill.

cards.name: THE GIVER
cards.note: Generosity is never wasted. It's seed money for a kinder world.

cards.name: THE FUTURE
cards.tagline: The best card is still unflipped.
cards.note: Your story isn't a recap — it's a trailer. The big scene hasn't aired yet.
